summary: Comprehensive testing of Zitex AI Chat System completed. All backend APIs (16/16 tests passed - 100%) and frontend functionality verified working correctly. Chat system successfully creates sessions, sends messages, receives AI responses, and generates images through the chat interface.
passed_tests: API POST /api/chat/sessions - Create general session
API POST /api/chat/sessions - Create image session
API POST /api/chat/sessions - Create video session
API POST /api/chat/sessions - Create website session
API GET /api/chat/sessions - Get user sessions list
API GET /api/chat/sessions/{id} - Get specific session with messages
API GET /api/chat/sessions/{id} - Returns 404 for non-existent session
API DELETE /api/chat/sessions/{id} - Delete (archive) session
API POST /api/chat/sessions/{id}/messages - Send message and receive AI response
API POST /api/chat/sessions/{id}/messages - Returns 404 for non-existent session
API - Session title updates after first message
API GET /api/chat/voices - Get available voices
API GET /api/chat/sessions/{id}/assets - Get session assets
API - Unauthorized access properly rejected (401)
API - Invalid token properly rejected (401)
API - Image generation flow through chat works
Frontend - Chat page loads with welcome screen
Frontend - New chat button visible and functional
Frontend - Session type cards (image/video/website) visible
Frontend - Create new session via card click
Frontend - Chat input and send button functional
Frontend - Messages display correctly (user and AI)
Frontend - Image attachments display in chat
Frontend - Sidebar shows session list with icons
Frontend - Session switching works
Frontend - Delete button appears on hover
Frontend - Navbar chat button ('الشات الذكي') visible and navigates to /chat
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed chat sessions created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chat system fully functional. Sessions are stored in MongoDB 'chat_sessions' collection. Image generation through chat uses Gemini model. Video generation uses Sora 2 (may take 2-5 minutes). Audio uses ElevenLabs. WhatsApp notifications are MOCKED. All chat APIs require JWT authentication.

chat_session_management.create_session: Working - supports general, image, video, website types
chat_session_management.get_sessions: Working - returns list with message count and last message preview
chat_session_management.get_session_by_id: Working - returns full session with messages

chat_messaging.send_message: Working - sends to AI and receives response
chat_messaging.image_generation: Working - AI triggers [GENERATE_IMAGE:] command and Gemini generates image
chat_messaging.session_title_update: Working - title updates to first message content

frontend_chat_ui.welcome_screen: Working - shows welcome message and session type cards
frontend_chat_ui.chat_interface: Working - input, send button, message display
frontend_chat_ui.sidebar: Working - shows sessions with type icons, delete on hover
